result.stdout:
Description:
  MsClaw gateway

Usage:
  msclaw [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  start  Start the gateway daemon
  auth   Authentication operations
  mind   Mind operations

result.stdout:
Description:
  Start the gateway daemon

Usage:
  msclaw start [options]

Options:
  --mind <mind>            Path to an existing mind directory
  --new-mind <new-mind>    Path to scaffold and start a new mind directory
  --tunnel                 Enable dev tunnel hosting for remote access
  --tunnel-id <tunnel-id>  Use the specified persistent dev tunnel ID
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
